accounts.name: reward_vault
docs: Optional: only required when reward is SPL (asset_reward_type != 2).

accounts.name: reward_mint
docs: Optional: only required when reward is SPL (asset_reward_type != 2).

accounts.name: user_reward_ata
docs: Optional: only required when reward is SPL (asset_reward_type != 2).

accounts.name: treasury_ata
docs: Optional: only required when reward is SPL (asset_reward_type != 2).

accounts.name: reward_token_program
docs: Optional: only required when reward is SPL (asset_reward_type != 2).

accounts.name: owner_deposit_ata
docs: Optional: only required for swap pools (ratio_bps != 0).
Must be the ATA of pool.target_address for deposit_mint.

accounts.name: staking_factory
docs: The staking program's factory PDA — used as the CPI signer.
Validates that only the staking program can call this instruction.

accounts.name: burn_factory
docs: The burn factory — ensures the instruction runs under burn's context.

errors.name: InvalidRatio
errors.msg: Invalid ratio: denominator must be greater than zero

errors.name: RewardTooSmall
errors.msg: Reward amount too small (rounds to zero)

errors.name: BothAssetsNative
errors.msg: Deposit and reward asset cannot both be native SOL

fields.name: whitelist_token
docs: Global whitelist of pubkeys managed by admin. Max MAX_WHITELIST_SIZE entries.
